Records.description: Pentagon ladder family, pentaladder_L4_massless-internal-dualconformal. Double pentaladder Omega^(L) (arXiv:1806.01361): L total loops, two pentagon caps + (L-2) box cells, 6 massless external legs (hexagon kinematics), massless internal lines. The double pentaladder is resummed to all loop orders via a Mellin-space finite-coupling formula. The one-pentagon variant is the penta-box ladder (5 dual points), a different object. CAVEAT: Scalar skeleton only: the defining integrals Omega^(L)/Omega-tilde^(L) carry a mandatory dual-conformal numerator (arXiv:1806.01361 eqs. 2.4-2.10); the seeded topology is the propagator skeleton, not the dressed integral, and carries no value.
